title: nie-bot: BotEvent/BotCommand serialization tests
description:
What: Unit test suite for BotEvent NDJSON serialization and BotCommand deserialization.

Algorithm:
1. In bot/src/io_types.rs #[cfg(test)] module:
   - test_bot_event_message_received_json: construct BotEvent::MessageReceived{..}, serialize, assert JSON has type=message_received, from, text fields
   - test_bot_event_type_tag: all variants have correct snake_case type tag (Connected→connected, etc.)
   - test_bot_command_send_deserialize: parse JSON {"cmd":"send","text":"hello"}, assert BotCommand::Send{text:"hello"}
   - test_bot_command_quit: parse {"cmd":"quit"}, assert BotCommand::Quit
   - test_bot_command_unknown_returns_err: parse {"cmd":"explode"}, assert serde_json::Error
   - test_emit_no_embedded_newlines: emit event, assert output does not contain bare newline mid-JSON

Defensive: Expected JSON values are hardcoded string literals, not regenerated from the code under test.

Agent team: T (tester — oracle is the serde tag documented in the bead above, not the struct code).
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-bot bot::io_types passes; all 6 tests present
